headline: 70% Crypto Hacks Hit France: Security Alert

article.title: 70% of all crypto wrench attacks happen in France: Report
article.summary: Centralized data collection is a honeypot for hackers and organized criminals looking to target crypto holders and their families, according to Bitcoiners.

article.title: Analysts forecast a Bitcoin crash to the $60K level, revisiting 2026 low
article.summary: The price of Bitcoin is about $75,800 at the time of publication, a nearly 40% decrease from the all-time high of about $126,000 reached in October 2025.

headline: Congo Ebola Outbreak Halts $10M Daily Mining Exports

article.title: Ebola Spreads Across Congo as Flights Halted, Supplies Run Low
article.summary: Congo suspended flights to the eastern city of Bunia and regional health ministers warned of escalating cross-border risks from Ebola as the outbreak spread across three provinces and overwhelmed contact-tracing efforts.

headline: Korea Traders Get High-Leverage Options Tonight

article.title: World’s Most Fervent Day Traders in Korea to Get Risky New Tools
article.summary: The world’s best-performing yet most volatile market is set to debut its first ever single-stock leveraged exchange‑traded funds this week, tools that have the potential to amplify gains and losses.

headline: ECB Warns Easing Stablecoin Rules Hurts Banks

headline: FTX Settlement: $66M Payout to Duped Crypto Investors

article.summary: The law firm, Fenwick & West, denied wrongdoing and still faces a separate $525 million suit in Washington that is not covered by Friday's deal.
